# PillFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable PillFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pillfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://pillfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.pillfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/pillfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/pillfyi-embed
- API: https://pillfyi.com/developers/

## Health FYI Widget Family

- [AnatomyFYI Widget](https://widget.anatomyfyi.com)
- [DrugFYI Widget](https://widget.drugfyi.com)
- [NutriFYI Widget](https://widget.nutrifyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
